value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Completed Wave 8/9 diagnostics hardening: resolveIsoOrRelative now supports explicit field attribution so parse failures reference the correct input path (for example reminder.at, event.end, --from, --to, --date, deadline-before/after) instead of generic deadline wording. Added targeted guidance for unsupported compound relative expressions such as +3d+1h. Updated create/update event/reminder parsing plus list/search/activity/calendar date-bound parsing to pass field labels, and added regression coverage for field-attributed diagnostics and compound-relative messaging. Verification passed: node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/create-command.spec.ts tests/unit/update-command.spec.ts tests/unit/list-command.spec.ts tests/unit/search-command.spec.ts tests/unit/history-activity-command.spec.ts tests/unit/calendar-command.spec.ts tests/integration/help-runtime.spec.ts tests/integration/release-readiness-runtime.spec.ts.
